name: HMS HDML 1308 (ML 1308)
events: 13 Sep 1944 HMS Upstart (Lt. P.C. Chapman, DSC and Bar, RN) departed La Maddalena for Malta. She was escorted by a HMS HDML 1308 (T/Lt. J.F. Ferrall, RNVR).
For the daily positions of HMS Upstart during this passage see the map below.
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
